source_rationale: Two populations of Pax7 and Myf5 expressing cells were observed which we called quiescence 1 and 2 (Q1 and Q2), while the two populations that expressed both Myod1 and Myog were called differentiated myoblasts 1 and 2 (DM1 and DM2, Figure 2A).

For example, the d4MS023-occupied cluster M5 was enriched for cell cycle markers (Cdk1, Cdk4, Ccnd3) and other markers of proliferation (Mki67, Birc5, Top2a) (Supplemental Table S1).
For example, the d4MS023-occupied cluster M5 was enriched for cell cycle markers (Cdk1, Cdk4, Ccnd3) and other markers of proliferation (Mki67, Birc5, Top2a) (Supplemental Table S1).

The other d4MS023-occupied cluster M3 retained some markers of proliferation (Ccnd1), however also expressed the cell cycle inhibitor Cdkn2a and the structural muscle gene Myl6, in addition to a strong enrichment for ribosomal genes (over 20% of the top100 markers belonged to the ribosomal protein family, a feature that is unique to cluster M3).

The other d4MS023-occupied cluster M3 retained some markers of proliferation (Ccnd1), however also expressed the cell cycle inhibitor Cdkn2a and the structural muscle gene Myl6, in addition to a strong enrichment for ribosomal genes (over 20% of the top100 markers belonged to the ribosomal protein family, a feature that is unique to cluster M3).

Conversely, the other d4 cluster M4 down-regulated these genes while maintaining expression of replication-dependent transcripts such as Ube2c and Dut, indicating increased heterogeneity in cycling cells compared to d4MS023 (Supplemental Table S1).

Conversely, the other d4 cluster M4 down-regulated these genes while maintaining expression of replication-dependent transcripts such as Ube2c and Dut, indicating increased heterogeneity in cycling cells compared to d4MS023 (Supplemental Table S1).

The final d4 cluster M1 resembled the transitional d4MS023 cluster M3 in that it expressed a mix of cell cycle (Ccnd1) and differentiation (Myl6) markers, however lacked the enrichment of ribosomal genes observed in M3 (Supplemental Table S1).
The genes which were uniquely enriched in cluster M3 were strongly associated with protein synthesis (e.g., Rps9, Eef1g, Uba52) (Supplemental Table S1, Supplemental Figure S2H, S2I).

In contrast, the enriched genes unique to cluster M1 were associated with cellular response to toxic substance and cellular detoxification (Anxa1, Txn1, Hmox1, Prdx5) (Supplemental Figure S2H, S2I).

DMSO clusters M1/M2/M4 and MS023 clusters M3/M5 were both enriched for proliferation markers (Cdk1, Mki67), and M3/M5 also uniquely harboured elevated metabolic genes including components of the ETC (Atp5k, Cox5a, Ndufa2) and components of glycolysis (Eno1, Gapdh).
